title: Cyclophorus tener
taxonomy: Cyclophorus tener belongs to the family Cyclophoridae, which is a group of small to medium-sized air-breathing land snails. This family is part of the larger phylum Mollusca, which includes a wide range of marine and terrestrial animals. Within the family Cyclophoridae, Cyclophorus tener is specifically classified under the genus Cyclophorus. This genus is known for its distinctive shell shape and size, and its species are commonly found in tropical regions. By classifying Cyclophorus tener within this family and genus, we can better understand its evolutionary history and relationships with other snail species.
